prompt.template: Based on the following analysis "{{result}}" Create a production description in plain text. Avoid contaminating the description with expressions like "Here is a plain text production description based on the provided analysis:" or "here's the description you asked for:" giving away the title in the description, like "**Nurgle 4cm Metal Enamel Pin - Warhammer 40k**". I just want a plain text, engaging product description. Provide only the pure description and nothing else.

You are given images {{images}}. Your job is to infer a short title in exactly this format, paying special attention guess the lore / franchise exactly:
<Name/Title> | <Approx Size> | <General Material> | <Object Type>  | <Lore/Franchise>
Rules
Output exactly one line and only the formatted title (no extra text).
Use pipe separators with single spaces around each |.
Field 1 (Name/Title):
	◦	Identify the main character/object name if recognizable.
	◦	If unknown, use a clear descriptor (e.g., “Red Dragon”, “Cute Cat”, “Skull Emblem”).
Field 2 (Approx Size):
	◦	Guess size in cm (e.g., 3 cm, 5 cm).
	◦	Use common assumptions when scale is unclear:
	▪	Pins: ~2–4 cm
	▪	Keychains: ~4–8 cm
	▪	Rings: ~2–3 cm visible face (or “Adjustable” is NOT allowed—must be cm)
	▪	Small figures/charms: ~3–6 cm

Field 3 (General Material): Use only broad categories like: Metal, Plastic, Wood, Rubber, Acrylic, Fabric, Paper, Glass, Leather.
Field 4 (Object Type): Choose the best match from: Pin, Keychain, Ring, Charm, Pendant, Patch, Sticker, Figure (or another single-word type if clearly different).
Field 5 (Lore/Franchise):
	◦	Use the most likely universe/series (e.g., “Pokémon”, “Disney”, “Marvel”).
	◦	If unclear, use a broad neutral label like: Original, Unknown, or Fantasy.
Quality checks
	•	Keep each field short (1–6 words).
	•	Don’t include color variants or long descriptions unless needed for identification.
	•	If multiple images show the same item, produce one best title.
Now analyze the image(s) and return the single formatted line.

Example outputs
	•	Courage | 3 cm | Metal | Pin  | Courage the Cowardly Dog
	•	Pikachu | 4 cm | Rubber | Keychain | Pokémon
	•	Skull Emblem | 3 cm | Metal | Ring | Original
